threatgraph_indicators.description: A process appears to be using a Remote Monitoring and Management (RMM) application in a suspicious manner. This may be an attempt to gather information, gain access, or drop other malicious payloads. Investigate the process tree and the detected process.
User hashes from SAM hive accessed from signed executable with untrusted root authority
A process launched whose behavior is likely related to a potentially unwanted program (PUP). Review the file.
A process has opened a handle to a Falcon process with excessive permissions requested. If this is unexpected, review the process tree and surrounding events.
A process associated with a known ransomware campaign launched. Investigate the host for signs of a ransomware attack.
A process launched whose behavior is likely related to a potentially unwanted program (PUP). Review the file.

description: A process appears to have performed a system call by bypassing UMPPC hooks.
name: UmppcBypassSuspected

description: A process gathered information about the operating system or hardware. Adversaries can use this to identify system vulnerabilities. Review the process tree.
name: GenericSystemInfoDiscovery
